principle: Positive-only generative slots. Tokens store compact lexical features; slot affordances are generated from those features; construction spans match slot types and render only present children. Learner display roles/colors are distinct from construction slots. Cantonese pro-drop and frequent ellipsis are supported through licensed optionality, not through making every template broadly optional.
forbidden_precedents: No null slots in parse instances

construction_templates.note: Opinion frame with optional explicit topic/content before the stative predicate.

Broad licensed-host plus scoped discourse-particle frame. Accepted families include directive/interpersonal 啦, change-state/current-relevance 喇, epistemic 啩, and broad evidential/noteworthiness 喎; narrower subtype remains trace metadata.
Price-range fragment anchored by price_range_noun such as 價位. Do not use for price-topic + stative predicate clauses.
Delimited VP for cognition predicates such as 諗吓; visible child role can still be doing.
Verb reduplication template. The same_surface constraint prevents broad action_verb + action_verb overmatching.
Desiderative VP uses a specific desiderative_modal anchor so general modals like 可以 do not overmatch.
Experiential clause with optional pro-drop subject and experiential_vp anchor.
Specific motion-experience VP such as 去過中環. Kept separate from bare ExperientialVP so the goal/location is not detached.
Progressive wh-object question such as 你講緊咩. Specific template should beat broader ReportedSpeech.
Cognition-delimited VP with object/content NP, e.g. 諗吓 + 音樂嘅嘢. Requires iterative category wrapping so useful subspans are preserved.
Explicit topic-comment evaluation construction. Keeps evaluation_clause and reported_content slots for compatibility.
Explicit topic-comment evaluation construction. Keeps evaluation_clause and reported_content slots for compatibility.
Clause wrapper for subject + DitransitiveSpeechVP, e.g. 我話你知.

speech_verb.label: doing
speech_verb.note: In 話你知, 話 is learner-visible doing/tell, while still filling speech_verb.

construction_templates.note: Speech/transfer VP: tell someone know / let someone know.
Compositional degree + stative predicate wrapper for cases like 好遠, 好正, 好貴.

stative_complement_head.label: like
stative_complement_head.note: Contextual sensory stative head in 好食 / 好飲.

construction_templates.note: Compositional degree + sensory head wrapper for cases like 好食 / 好飲.
Degree word modifies a dictionary-backed lexicalized 好X stative predicate. This is intentionally distinct from ordinary DegreeStativePredicate 好 + 遠.
Ordinary degree + independently usable stative predicate. This path intentionally excludes lexicalized 好X statives such as 好食 and degree-modified lexicalized statives such as 好好食.
Topic-comment now accepts the safe comment predicate family rather than only a raw stative_predicate.
Negator plus positive lexicalized 好X stative predicate. Bare 唔好食 remains NeedsContext because it can also mean don't eat.
Conventional negative lexicalized stative predicates, often 難X counterparts to 好X entries.
Direct nominal wh determiner plus visible noun head, e.g. 咩書 / 咩人 / 咩嘢; the broad ModifiedNP label is retained.

patch_doctrine.workflow: Use diagnostic-driven small-slice patches rather than broad parser refactors.
patch_when_diagnostics_show: wrong broad wrapper such as ModifiedNP stealing verb material
patch_doctrine.before_each_patch: Ask whether the case is a one-off fix or evidence for a general construction principle.
patch_doctrine.preference: Prefer reusable generative templates and category spans over phrase-specific fixes.
patch_doctrine.deferred: Do a dedicated Template Flexibility Audit later after enough diagnostics accumulate; do not add a global scoring/template-metadata system yet.

flexibility_doctrine.summary: Support Cantonese pro-drop through licensed optionality, not greedy fully optional templates.
complements_optional_only_when: the result is intentionally marked as a fragment or NeedsContext
anti_greediness_rules: prefer specific templates before broad templates
add contrast cases when a patch could overmatch
keep NeedsContext/special_ambiguity_rule for genuinely ambiguous short utterances

learner_role_doctrine.summary: Learner role/color answers what the learner should notice in this sentence; construction slot answers what grammatical position the token fills.

examples.note: In 我想諗吓, 諗 is the action being wanted, so it should display as doing.
In learner-facing color, 覺得 is still a verb-like predicate introducing an opinion frame, so it displays as doing while grammar slots/features carry cognition/stance details.
Learner-facing role is measure_word; internal grammar slot remains classifier inside demonstrative/classifier NPs such as 呢間餐廳.

learner_role_doctrine.anti_confusion_rule: Do not infer learner color directly from assigned construction slot.
learner_role_doctrine.classifier_boundary_rule: classifier is an internal grammar slot, not a learner role. Measure-word/classifier tokens display as learner role measure_word.

anti_greediness_examples.principle: Use a constrained ReduplicatedVP category rather than a broad action_verb + action_verb template.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: Broad DesiderativeVP using modal! stole a general ModalVP sentence.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Use desiderative_modal! as the DesiderativeVP identity anchor.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: Bare ExperientialVP wrapped 去過 and left subject/goal detached.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add specific ExperientialMotionGoalVP and sentence-level ExperientialClause anchored on experiential_vp.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: ReportedSpeech overmatched progressive what-object question because 講 is a speech verb and 咩 could fill reported_content.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add wh_object and a specific ProgressiveWhObjectQuestion before ReportedSpeech.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: Missing 音樂 lexicon and lack of cognition-delimited object VP caused detached subject and ModalVP heuristic fallback.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add 音樂 as a noun/modifier and combine CognitionDelimitedVP + object NP through iterative positive category wrapping.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: ModifiedNP overmatched 覺得音樂 because verb_modifier could alias any predicate.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add opinion_topic to OpinionStanceFrame and restrict verb_modifier to explicit verb_modifier slots.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: OpinionStanceFrame overmatched speech-reporting 話 as stance_predicate.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add EvaluationClause as reported_content and ensure ReportedSpeech wins for speech_verb + reported_content.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: EvaluationClause existed only as a top-level template, so ReportedSpeech could not see reported_content.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add EvaluationClause to category subspan templates for iterative wrapping.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: DitransitiveSpeechVP parsed correctly, but the subject remained detached and 話 stayed visually stance in a tell-action frame.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add SpeechTransferClause and contextual role override for DitransitiveSpeechVP speech_verb.
anti_greediness_examples.target: SpeechTransferClause(subject + DitransitiveSpeechVP), with 話 visible as doing and internally speech_verb.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: The structure parsed correctly as EvaluationClause, but the construction name hid the topic-comment nature.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Rename/represent as TopicCommentEvaluation while preserving evaluation/reported-content slots.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: TopicCommentEvaluation parsed internally, but a broad PriceRangeFragment wrapped it because inherited child slots included price_noun.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add price_range_noun and require it for PriceRangeFragment.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: Topic-comment construction could not form because 遠 was unknown.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add 遠/近 as distance stative predicates.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: The parse was correct, but 遠 appeared with feature verb_class: stance because distance_stative matched the substring 'stance'.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Use exact syntax-part matching for stance feature inference.
anti_greediness_examples.target: 遠 remains role like / stative_predicate with no stance verb_class.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: 好食 was one opaque-like token while 好遠 split 好 + 遠, causing inconsistent color and Jyutping visibility.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Make common 好+stative phrases compositional and add DegreeStativePredicate.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: v0.4.33 split 好食 into 好 + 食, which is useful compositional grammar but loses the dictionary-backed lexicalized predicate.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add lexicalized 好X stative registry and allow 好食 to longest-match as one stative predicate.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: Without a named degree-modified lexical-stative template, 好好食 could be interpreted as a generic degree-stative span or flattened as 好 + 好 + 食.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Add DegreeModifiedLexicalStative before ordinary DegreeStativePredicate.

anti_greediness_examples.case: 中環好遠。 / 意粉好食。 / 意粉好好食。
anti_greediness_examples.problem: A single broad DegreeStativePredicate path could blur ordinary degree + stative, base lexicalized 好X statives, and degree-modified lexicalized statives.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Make DegreeStativePredicate consume ordinary_stative_predicate only.
anti_greediness_examples.target: 好遠 → DegreeStativePredicate; 好食 → lexicalized_stative_predicate; 好好食 → DegreeModifiedLexicalStative.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: If comment_predicate were aliased to every predicate/VP, ordinary subject-verb clauses could be misread as topic-comment.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Do not alias comment_predicate to generic predicate or vp.
anti_greediness_examples.target: TopicCommentEvaluation accepts safe comment predicates only.

anti_greediness_examples.problem: Bare 唔好食 can mean not tasty or don't eat.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Keep the bare form as NeedsContext while allowing topic/comment contexts to use NegatedLexicalizedStative.
anti_greediness_examples.target: 意粉唔好食 → topic + NegatedLexicalizedStative; 唔好食 → NeedsContext; 唔好食呢個 → ProhibitiveImperative.

anti_greediness_examples.case: 好食 / 好好食 / 好遠
anti_greediness_examples.problem: Longest-match plus a manual compositional list can regress if a lexicalized stative is accidentally marked compositional.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Use explicit lexical candidate scoring and make lexicalized stative registry entries immune to forced compositional splitting.
anti_greediness_examples.target: 好食 lexicalized; 好好食 = 好 + 好食; 好遠 = 好 + 遠.

anti_greediness_examples.case: 好好食 / 好食 / 好遠
anti_greediness_examples.problem: Without selection diagnostics, a correct parse does not explain why one phrase stayed lexicalized while another split compositionally.
anti_greediness_examples.fix: Attach selection_decision to atomic token traces.
anti_greediness_examples.target: Diagnostic output explains registry evidence, forced compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.

lexical_additions.label: what
lexical_additions.note: Needed for examples like 音樂嘅嘢; should not split into unknown 音 + 樂.

slot_notes.note: An explicit noun/topic inside an opinion frame, e.g. 音樂 in 我覺得音樂好正.
For 話/聽講 as attributed-source or evidential/reportative material. This is different from direct opinion stance_predicate.
Narrow slot for 價位 / price-point nouns. Prevents PriceRangeFragment from wrapping ordinary price-topic evaluations such as 價錢貴.
Context-only slot for 食/飲 after degree words. It avoids making 食 globally stative while allowing 好食 to display as 好 + 食.
Registry-backed 好X stative predicates that should not be split by default, e.g. 好食, 好飲, 好睇, 好聽, 好味.
Construction slot for degree + lexicalized 好X stative, e.g. 好 + 好食.
Derived from like/stative tokens that are not lexicalized_stative, not sensory_stative_head, and not already a degree_stative_predicate.

Safe topic-comment comment family. Includes stative predicates, lexicalized 好X statives, ordinary degree-statives, and degree-modified lexicalized statives. Excludes generic VP/predicate to avoid overwrapping normal subject-verb clauses.
Dictionary-backed negative lexicalized stative predicate such as 難食 / 難飲 / 難睇 / 難聽.

topic_comment_doctrine.principle: Cantonese topic-comment clauses should be represented explicitly, not hidden under generic evaluation naming.
topic_comment_doctrine.embedded_use: Can serve as reported_content inside ReportedSpeech.

lexical_categories.note: Distance adjectives/statives participate in topic-comment evaluation, e.g. 中環好遠.

feature_doctrine.principle: Do exact syntax-part matching for stance features.
feature_doctrine.problem: Substring matching made distance_stative count as stance because 'distance' contains 'stance'.
feature_doctrine.target: 遠/近 remain stative_predicate distance_stative, but do not receive verb_class stance.

visual_doctrine.principle: Degree-stative phrases should split visible degree and predicate components.
visual_doctrine.target: 好 is visible as how/degree; the following stative head is visible separately as like/comment.

visual_doctrine.principle: Base lexicalized 好X statives should remain one learner-visible predicate.
visual_doctrine.target: 好食/好飲 appear as one like-colored stative predicate; intensified forms like 好好食 remain candidates for degree + lexicalized predicate.

visual_doctrine.principle: Intensified lexicalized 好X statives should be degree + lexicalized predicate.
visual_doctrine.target: Show the first 好 separately as degree/how, then keep 好食/好飲/好睇 as one like-colored lexicalized stative predicate.

visual_doctrine.principle: Ordinary degree-stative predicates should remain compositional.
visual_doctrine.target: Show 好 separately as how/degree and the following ordinary stative as like/comment.

visual_doctrine.principle: TopicCommentEvaluation should accept any safe comment predicate, not only one surface kind of stative.
examples: 好好食 as degree-modified lexicalized stative
visual_doctrine.target: The topic-comment wrapper should choose topic + comment_predicate while preserving the internal comment analysis.

visual_doctrine.principle: Separate negation of a lexicalized stative from a negative lexicalized stative.
visual_doctrine.target: 唔好食 with topic/comment context is negator + 好食; 難食 is a conventional negative stative; bare 唔好食 remains ambiguous.

lexicalized_stative_registry.intensified_behavior: 好好食 should be parsed as degree + 好食 in a later DegreeModifiedLexicalStative pass

lexicalized_stative_registry.base_behavior: one stative predicate meaning good to drink
one stative predicate meaning good-looking / enjoyable to watch
one stative predicate meaning pleasant-sounding / pleasant to hear

negative_lexicalized_stative_registry.base_behavior: one negative stative predicate meaning bad-tasting / unpalatable
one negative stative predicate meaning bad to drink
one negative stative predicate meaning ugly / unpleasant to watch
one negative stative predicate meaning unpleasant-sounding / harsh

selection_rules.principle: When a registry-backed lexicalized stative is a tokenization candidate, prefer it over compositional splitting.

examples.好食: select 好食 as lexicalized_stative_predicate, not 好 + 食
examples.好好食: force outer 好好食 compositional, then select inner 好食
examples.難食: select 難食 as negative_lexicalized_stative_predicate, not 難 + 食

selection_rules.not_implemented_here: Full human-readable diagnostic explanation is deferred to #7.

diagnostic_rules.principle: When tokenization chooses a lexical candidate, diagnostics should show the candidates, registry kind, score, forced-compositional exclusions, and reason.

examples.好食: selection_decision shows 好食 chosen by lexicalized_stative_registry scoring over 好
examples.好好食: first 好 shows 好好食 excluded as forced compositional; inner 好食 shows lexicalized registry choice
examples.好遠: selection_decision shows ordinary lookup, not lexicalized registry

controlled_feature_schema.purpose: Use controlled feature bundles as parser-active predicates for already-stabilized stative logic only.
doctrine: Feature bundles are internal parser evidence, not learner-visible role labels.
Use +feature / -feature notation only as diagnostic shorthand.
Store features as enums, booleans, arrays, and provenance metadata.
No parser-active feature is promoted in Phase 1.

gradability.phase_3_parser_active_when: Only when the bundle is a stative predicate bundle.

can_head_comment.phase_3_parser_active_when: Only when derived from a stative predicate bundle.

parser_active.phase_3_default: False except for explicitly migrated stative predicate bundle fields.

phase_3_policy.behavior_contract: No new grammar behavior; Phase 3 only replaces current stative string/slot checks with feature predicate helpers.

promotion_requirements: diagnostic trace explains the feature if it affects parsing

confidence_rules.allowed_use: May generate parser slots only after contrast tests pass and parser_active is explicitly true.
May support parser slots only when construction context independently supports the parse.

anti_rules: Do not convert raw dictionary POS directly into parser truth.
Do not infer lexicalized_stative from every 好X phrase.
Do not infer comment eligibility from every predicate or VP.
Do not expose feature bundles as extra learner color roles.
Do not make low-confidence or runtime-inferred features parser-active.

controlled_feature_assignment_examples.phase_1_note: Visible role remains doing; cognition is internal.
Visible role remains doing in 話你知; cognition is internal.

implementation_phases.next_phase: Derived runtime featureBundleFor helper, still behavior-preserving.

runtime_feature_bundle_contract.phase_2_rule: Feature bundles may be shown in diagnostics but must not alter slots or construction matching.

implementation.phase: Controlled Feature Schema Phase 3 stative parser-active migration
notes: Parser-active feature bundle use is limited to the existing stative logic.
Speech, stance, cognition, productive VO, and general NP feature bundles remain parser-inactive.
Regression cases preserve v0.4.44 construction behavior.

v0_5_143_notes.direct_wh_np: 咩 carries a direct_nominal_wh_determiner affordance and combines with a visible head noun under broad ModifiedNP.
v0_5_143_notes.attachment_guard: A generic TransitiveVP over V + 咩 is deferred when a following head noun belongs inside the direct wh NP.
boundaries: bare 咩 remains lexical wh material
sentence-final polar 咩 still requires a proposition host
邊 without classifier does not use the direct nominal pattern

v0_5_146_notes.laa_boundary: Keep 啦 laa1 directive/interpersonal scope distinct from 喇 laa3 change-state/current-relevance scope despite ordinary spelling variation; neither particle licenses an unresolved host, and 喇 remains structurally separate from perfective 咗.
